claims.summary: A resonance observation must remain distinct from an intervention request or executable control.
claims.disposition: verify measurement, requested intervention, and authorized execution as separate typed states

claims.summary: Intervention intent needs a canonical enum rather than an ambiguous scalar or prose field.
claims.disposition: verify ResonanceInterventionType serialization and compatibility fixtures

claims.summary: Damping evidence must retain provenance and remain bounded by existing safety policy.
claims.disposition: verify provenance-linked bounded damping and unchanged regulator calculations

claims.summary: Changing intervention thresholds, damping, PI behavior, or live control bounds alters Minime regulation.
